tool_args.label: New York City Transit Key Performance Metrics - January 2023

payload.title: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: Performance metrics document prepared for the January 2023 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee

evidence_refs.source_quote: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
This performance metrics document was prepared for the January 2023 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee.
2 Broadway • New York, NY 10004 Monday, January 30, 2023

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Transit & Bus Committee
New York City Transit and MTA Bus operate all subways and buses in New York City.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000-square-mile travel area surrounding New York City

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000-square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Richard Davey, President of New York City Transit

evidence_refs.source_quote: Richard Davey President, New York City Transit
New York City Transit and MTA Bus operate all subways and buses in New York City.

payload.project_name: Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign Plan
payload.description: Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign Plan implemented in June 2022

evidence_refs.source_quote: We had another successful launch of the Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign Plan in June 2022
In 2022, we implemented the Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign and see a positive increase in speed.

payload.status: draft plan released March 2022, Proposed Final Plan pending
payload.description: Queens Bus Network Redesign New Draft Plan released in March 2022, one of the largest bus network redesigns in the country with over 100 routes

evidence_refs.source_quote: We also released the Queens Bus Network Redesign New Draft Plan in March 2022 which is one of the largest bus network redesigns in the country, with over 100 routes.

payload.description: Draft Brooklyn Bus Network Redesign Plan released last month (December 2022), the first overhaul of Brooklyn bus service in decades

evidence_refs.source_quote: The draft Brooklyn Bus Network Redesign Plan was released last month
first overhaul of Brooklyn bus service in decades.

payload.description: Draft Brooklyn Bus Network Redesign Plan released last month (December 2022), the first overhaul of Brooklyn bus service in decades

evidence_refs.source_quote: The draft Brooklyn Bus Network Redesign Plan was released last month
overhaul of Brooklyn bus service in decades

payload.description: Station cosmetic upgrades combined with planned weekend outages, relamping with LED energy efficient lighting. Goal to refresh 50 stations within its first full year.

evidence_refs.source_quote: As part of the NYCT Station Re-NEW-vation project which has combined cosmetic upgrades at stations to planned weekend outages; stations are being re-lamped with brighter, LED- energy efficient lighting.
NYCT crews have already completed thirteen re-new-vations since the program started.
The program's goal is to refresh 50 stations within its first full year.

tool_args.label: MTA ABLE (Automated Bus Lane Enforcement) Program

payload.status: expanded - 300 buses and 9 new routes in 2022; 600 additional cameras planned by end of 2023
payload.description: Bus lane enforcement camera program. Benefits from pilot phase include speed improvements of 5% above borough average, collision reductions. 50K citations issued in 2022.

evidence_refs.source_quote: With the installation of ABLE (Automatic Bus Lane Enforcement) cameras
Benefits from the ABLE pilot phase:
The successful expansion of Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) cameras will take us to another level

issues: evidence_refs[1].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.status: ongoing - 6 months in, over halfway through
payload.description: 6-month Open Stroller Pilot on 7 bus routes. To date there's been persistent use of the stroller space across the seven pilot routes, with the highest usage on the Bx23 and the S53. No reported conflicts or incidents.

evidence_refs.source_quote: the 6-month Open Stroller Pilot is just over halfway through
highest usage on the Bx23 and the S53. There have been no reported conflicts or incidents on the pilot routes.

tool_args.label: MTA ABLE (Automated Bus Lane Enforcement) Program

payload.description: Bus lane enforcement camera program. Benefits from pilot phase include speed improvements of 5% above borough average, collision reductions. 50K citations issued in 2022.
payload.status: expanded - 300 buses and 9 new routes in 2022; 600 additional cameras planned by end of 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: With the installation of ABLE (Automatic Bus Lane Enforcement) cameras
Benefits from the ABLE pilot phase:
The successful expansion of Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) cameras will take us to another level

payload.note: Referenced in ABLE pilot benefits: 30% decrease in collisions below borough average

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Speed improvements of 5% above the borough average • 30% decrease in collisions below borough average on M15 SBS • 25% decrease in collisions on M14 SBS at locations with ABLE/busway compared to those without • 50% decrease in collisions on B44 SBS at locations with ABLE compared to those without

tool_args.label: Reduced-Fare OMNY Event - Riverdale Senior Services

payload.description: MTA Government and Community Relations and Systemwide Accessibility teams presented to Riverdale Senior Services on Reduced Fare OMNY. Nearly 100 seniors attended.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On December 6, 2022, members of the MTA's Government and Community Relations and Systemwide Accessibility teams presented to Riverdale Senior Services (RSS) on the benefits of switching over from Reduced Fare MetroCard to Reduced Fare OMNY.

tool_args.label: Reduced-Fare OMNY Event - St. Charles Jubilee, Brooklyn Heights

payload.description: MTA Government & Community Relations and Systemwide Accessibility attended gathering at St. Charles Jubilee to discuss Reduced Fare OMNY with Brooklyn Heights seniors.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Representatives from MTA Government & Community Relations and Systemwide Accessibility attended a gathering at St. Charles Jubilee on December 7, 2022, to discuss the benefits of switching to Reduced Fare OMNY with Brooklyn Heights seniors.

payload.description: Roll out of first three Customer Service Centers at Atlantic Avenue-Barclays Center, Stillwell Avenue, and 161 St-Yankee Stadium

evidence_refs.source_quote: Subways is eager to roll out the first three Customer Service Centers at the end of this month.

tool_args.label: North Star goal: 10% customer satisfaction increase by June 2024

payload.claim_text: North Star goal of increasing customer satisfaction 10% by June 2024

payload.description: NYCT's North Star goal introduced in June 2022, targeting 10% customer satisfaction increase by June 2024

payload.claim_text: 50K citations were issued in 2022, 3% fewer than 2021 and 23% fewer than 2020 even with new routes added. 92% of violators commit two or fewer violations indicating success of the program in deterring violators.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 92% of violators commit two or fewer violations

evidence_refs.source_quote: expanding new Bus Lane enforcement cameras on 300 additional buses and 9 new routes in 2022. In partnership with NYCDOT, 80% of existing bus lanes will be equipped with camera enforcement by the end of 2023.
